jobs.title: Software Development Engineer III
details: Delivered FIPS, PrivateLink, and IPv6 support for Amazon Verified Permissions.
Built the integration between Amazon Verified Permissions and AWS IAM Identity Center, giving AWS first-party apps a seamless, unified authorization experience.
Leading development of internal APIs (soon to be externalized) that let service teams answer permission queries such as "who has access to what?" and "all resources for a user?"
Authored a Cedar language server (open-source contribution).

jobs.title: Software Development Engineer II
details: Designed and built a Rust-based managed authentication and authorization service powering a new zero-trust identity service.
Vendored internal Rust libraries for other AWS service teams to integrate with the service.
Engineered caching solutions delivering single-digit-millisecond response times.
Drove cross-team design and implementation, creating task breakdowns to coordinate teammates and partner teams.

jobs.title: Software Development Engineer II
details: Engineered a drag-and-drop lifecycle-marketing tool enabling marketers to build personalized experiences for millions of users per day.
Developed a cross-team ML feature that automatically selects the best customer experience.
Reduced S3, Athena, and Glue resource utilization via storage reductions, query optimization, and effective partitioning.
Built an automated system to halt under-performing or malfunctioning campaigns.
Mentored teammates, ran code/design/doc reviews, and owned on-call. (Angular, Java, AWS, SQL, large-scale distributed services.)

jobs.title: Software Development Engineer I
details: Designed and implemented a notification system delivering hundreds of weekly notifications on campaign progress, engagement, and issues.
Built a high-capacity customer event processor handling millions of events and engaging users at key lifecycle milestones.

jobs.title: Software Developer Intern
details: Built backend services for the company's new mobile app alongside a third-party vendor.
Created a CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions and integrated with Salesforce and other CRMs.

jobs.title: Software Development Engineer Intern
details: Delivered a debugger tool for marketers to see a customer's position within their campaigns.

jobs.title: Software Developer Intern
details: Built a system using Amazon Textract, Rekognition, and Salesforce to auto-process hundreds of invoices per day.

Built web-accessible Power BI dashboards, refactored an Azure IoT app to cut costs, and improved Azure Cosmos DB efficiency for a 10x reduction in website load times. Migrated projects from Team Foundation Server to GitHub.
Cum Laude

projects.title: spotify-lyrics
projects.description: A spotify player that gets the lyrics for the song you are currently listening to.

projects.title: Super-Marka-Metrics
projects.description: A supermarket budgeting tool that helped users visualize their spending habits and uses machine learning to predict the cost of future trips to the store.

projects.title: V-Net Lab
projects.description: A network topology tool similar to Microsoft Visio. Allows user to design the layout of their network and configure network devices.

projects.title: Automated Document Processor
projects.description: Event driven, serverless processor that reads, extracts and bills invoice information using optical character recogition. Reduces human interaction with the billing process by 15%

projects.title: zero-touch-sani-system
projects.description: Senior design project. A handsfree sanitation system to sanitize areas in the office. Uses raspberry pi, various perhipals like monition sensors, google cloud IOT, firebase and a web interface to control the device.
